title: Crafted Stats
description: Minecraft Plugin that shows Server Stats in-game
body:
# Crafted Stats

**In-Game Server Statistics GUI for Bukkit/Spigot/Paper**

---

## Description
Crafted Stats is a sleek and lightweight Minecraft plugin that delivers detailed server statistics right inside the game. Easily browse through multiple pages of valuable information such as uptime, player data, server performance, world details, plugin count, and more — all accessible via an intuitive GUI.

---

## Features
- Real-time server uptime and TPS monitoring  
- Detailed player stats including online count, unique joins, and operators  
- World info such as loaded chunks, world borders, and difficulty  
- Insight into server version, MOTD, loaded plugins, and banned players  
- Multi-page GUI with simple next/previous navigation  
- Dynamic updates with minimal server load  
- Easy to use and configure  

---

## Commands
- `/serverstats` — Opens the Crafted Stats GUI  

---

## Requirements
- Bukkit / Spigot / Paper 1.19+  

---

## Installation
1. Place the plugin jar into your server’s `plugins` folder  
2. Restart or reload your server  
3. Run `/serverstats` in-game to open the stats interface  

---

## Support
Having trouble ? Please concact the Developer via Discord ( _cow_0990
